## Describe the bug

A clear, concise description of what went wrong.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen instead.

## Environment

- OS / architecture: <!-- e.g. macOS 14.5 arm64, Ubuntu 22.04 amd64, Windows 11 arm64 -->
- Flick version / commit: <!-- `git rev-parse HEAD` or release version -->
- libmpv version: <!-- `mpv --version` -->
- Install method: <!-- built from source / .deb / .AppImage / .dmg / .exe installer -->

## Logs / screenshots

Paste any terminal output (stdout/stderr) or attach screenshots if relevant.

## Additional context

Anything else that might help (file format being played, was it a video or image, etc.).
